ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-16-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
John DuBois, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc. dba Great Western Collection BUreau.
Plaintiff's witness: Pam Frese, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Christopher J. Augusto aka Chris J. Augusto ind./dba Christopher J. Augusto Plumbing Company as follows:
Damages $27,367.98
Prejudgment Interest $5,859.00
Costs $325.00 for a total of $33,551.98
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-24-2005 Continued To Jul-18-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
